glosses.ro: a se înregistra; a se autentifica
glosses.ja: 登録する; ログインする

translations.en: I would like to sign up.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular (1st person); subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II of ‘mögen’) expressing desire; finite verb selecting the infinitive at clause end.
Reflexive personal pronoun (1st person singular, accusative), co-referential with the subject; required by the reflexive construction ‘sich anmelden’.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; separable-prefix verb (an- + melden) meaning ‘to register/sign up’, placed at clause end due to the modal.

sentences.target: Wir müssen das Kind im Kindergarten anmelden.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsən das kɪnt ɪm ˈkɪndɐɡaːʁtn̩ ˈanˌmɛldən/

translations.de: Wir müssen das Kind im Kindergarten anmelden.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsən das kɪnt ɪm ˈkɪndɐɡaːʁtn̩ ˈanˌmɛldən/
translations.en: We have to register the child at the kindergarten.
translations.es: Tenemos que inscribir al niño en el jardín de infancia.
translations.fr: Nous devons inscrire l’enfant à la maternelle.
translations.it: Dobbiamo iscrivere il bambino alla scuola materna.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得给孩子在幼儿园报名。
translations.yue: 我哋要幫個小朋友喺幼稚園報名。
translations.ru: Нам нужно записать ребёнка в детский сад.
translations.pt: Precisamos matricular a criança no jardim de infância.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לרשום את הילד לגן.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải đăng ký cho bé vào mẫu giáo.
translations.ar: يجب أن نسجل الطفل في الروضة.
translations.nl: We moeten het kind inschrijven op de kleuterschool.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно записати дитину до дитячого садка.
translations.hu: Be kell íratnunk a gyereket az óvodába.
translations.hi: हमें बच्चे का किंडरगार्टन में दाखिला कराना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να γράψουμε το παιδί στο νηπιαγωγείο.
translations.nb: Vi må registrere barnet i barnehagen.
translations.id: Kita harus mendaftarkan anak ke taman kanak-kanak.
translations.sv: Vi måste skriva in barnet på förskolan.
translations.ro: Trebuie să înscriem copilul la grădiniță.
translations.da: Vi skal melde barnet ind i børnehaven.
translations.ja: 子どもを幼稚園に申し込まないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative plural (1st person); subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st person plural) expressing necessity; selects the infinitive at clause end.
Definite article (neuter, accusative singular) introducing the direct object ‘Kind’.
Common noun (neuter); direct object of ‘anmelden’ (accusative).
Preposition contracted with a definite article (‘in dem’ → ‘im’); introduces a locative PP and governs the dative.
Common noun (masculine, dative singular here due to ‘im’); head of the locative PP.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; separable-prefix verb (an- + melden), placed clause-final due to the modal.

translations.fr: Tu peux nous inscrire en ligne.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以在网上帮我们报名。
translations.yue: 你可以喺網上幫我哋報名。
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đăng ký cho chúng tôi trực tuyến.
translations.hi: आप हमें ऑनलाइन रजिस्टर कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορείς να μας δηλώσεις στο ίντερνετ.
translations.nb: Du kan registrere oss på nettet.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mendaftarkan kami secara online.
translations.sv: Du kan anmäla oss på nätet.
translations.da: Du kan tilmelde os på nettet.
translations.ja: オンラインで私たちを登録できます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular (2nd person); subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 2nd person singular) expressing ability; selects the infinitive at clause end.
Personal pronoun (1st person plural; accusative form here as direct object of ‘anmelden’).
Manner adverb modifying ‘anmelden’; indicates the medium of registration.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; separable-prefix verb (an- + melden), governed by the modal.

sentences.target: Sie will sich für den Kurs anmelden.
sentences.reading: /ziː vɪl zɪç fyːɐ deːn kʊʁs ˈanˌmɛldən/

translations.de: Sie will sich für den Kurs anmelden.
translations.ipa: /ziː vɪl zɪç fyːɐ deːn kʊʁs ˈanˌmɛldən/
translations.en: She wants to sign up for the course.
translations.es: Ella quiere inscribirse en el curso.
translations.zh-Hans: 她想报名参加这个课程。
translations.yue: 佢想報名參加呢個課程。
translations.pt: Ela quer se inscrever no curso.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn đăng ký khóa học.
translations.nl: Ze wil zich inschrijven voor de cursus.
translations.hi: वह कोर्स में दाखिला लेना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Ona chce zapisać się na kurs.
translations.nb: Hun vil melde seg på kurset.
translations.sv: Hon vill anmäla sig till kursen.
translations.ro: Ea vrea să se înscrie la curs.
translations.ja: 彼女はその講座に申し込みたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person singular, nominative); subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3rd person singular) expressing volition; selects the infinitive at clause end.
Reflexive pronoun (3rd person singular, accusative) required by the reflexive construction ‘sich anmelden’, co-referential with the subject.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces the target/theme of registration.
Definite article (masculine, accusative singular) modifying ‘Kurs’ within the PP headed by ‘für’.
Common noun (masculine, accusative singular) as object of the preposition ‘für’.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; separable-prefix verb (an- + melden) used reflexively with ‘sich’ to mean ‘to sign up (for)’.
